    Find events that start at the specified date or later
    org.springframework.data.domain.Page<@NonNull EventDTO>

    Find events based on their location
    org.springframework.data.domain.Page<@NonNull EventDTO>
    EventService.getEventsByTopic(List<String> topics, org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable pageable)
    Find events that contain at least one of the specified topics
    org.springframework.data.domain.Page<@NonNull EventDTO>
    EventService.getEventsByTopicAndDate(List<String> categories, LocalDate date, org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable pageable)
    Find every event containing at least one of the specified topics and starting at the specified date or later
